creator: beldin@beldin.org
text:
Curiously I haven't seen the issue raised in that other bug report at all.

I assumed it might was because I'm having trouble on -CURRENT and the reported cases might have been on production machines that might be -STABLE or -RELEASE.



I've attached the build log for qemu-user-static-devel (qemu-user-static failed at same file in same way, logs have been cleaned up since then).
